_description: Azure Monitor Action Groups – equivalent to AWS SNS topics used by CloudWatch alarms. Replace placeholder emails/URLs before deploying.

action_groups.name: ag-pipeline-critical
action_groups.description: Notified on Error/Critical pipeline alerts. Replaces SNS topic arn:aws:sns:…:pipeline-alerts.

webhook.name: Teams-Webhook
webhook._comment: Replace __TEAMS_WEBHOOK_ID__ with your Microsoft Teams incoming webhook URL

action_groups.name: ag-pipeline-warning
action_groups.description: Notified on Warning-level pipeline alerts (stale pipeline, long run times).

key_differences: Azure Action Groups support SMS, Email, Voice, Webhook, ITSM, Runbook, Logic App, and Azure Function receivers natively.
A single Action Group can be reused across multiple alert rules (unlike SNS where each alarm specifies its own topic ARN).
Microsoft Teams integration uses the built-in 'Microsoft Teams' receiver type or a Webhook to an Incoming Webhook connector.
